/usr/bin/c++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/hexapod.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/hexapod.dir/src/HexapodApp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hexapod.dir/src/Leg.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hexapod.dir/src/HexapodBody.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hexapod.dir/src/TripodGait.cpp.o -o build/Debug/hexapod  /home/namotyl/Repos/Cinder/lib/linux/x86_64/ogl/Debug/libcinder.a /usr/lib/libBulletDynamics.so /usr/lib/libBulletCollision.so /usr/lib/libLinearMath.so /usr/lib/libBulletSoftBody.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libGLU.so /usr/lib/libSM.so /usr/lib/libICE.so /usr/lib/libX11.so /usr/lib/libXext.so -lXcursor -lXinerama -lXrandr -lXi /usr/lib/libz.so /usr/lib/libcurl.so /usr/lib/libfontconfig.so /usr/lib/libpulse.so /usr/lib/libmpg123.so /usr/lib/libsndfile.so /usr/lib/libgobject-2.0.so /usr/lib/libglib-2.0.so /usr/lib/libgstreamer-1.0.so /usr/lib/libgstbase-1.0.so /usr/lib/libgstapp-1.0.so /usr/lib/libgstvideo-1.0.so /usr/lib/libgstgl-1.0.so -ldl -lpthread -lgcc_s_asneeded -lgcc_s_asneeded
